purpose: Define the structured profile required to drive a bounded generation run optimized across semantic quality, structure, reader impact, virality, and insight density.

optional_fields.obligation_targets: required setups, payoffs, threads, or shifts
optional_fields.style_constraints: surface form constraints that do not override voice system

schema_notes: Profiles define targets and guardrails, not runtime authority.
Platform targeting remains contextual and may not override v4/v5/v6 gating.
